attachments.name: user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password" [Status.failed]

steps.name: When user navigates to "Videos" section of Explore
When user "plays" the entity "Video 1 - IFL with Paragraph 8.1" from Explore "Videos" using Filter "Recent"
When user applies template "CSA" on the video play page
When user gives review as "like" on video playing in the csa play page
And user changes its review from "like" to "dislike" on the csa play page
Then user gives review as "like" on video playing in the csa play page at the end of video

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Verify video view on play page for vertical videos CSA
